ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tanks" (
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank */,
  "tank_name" TEXT /* Name of the tank */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle class of the tank */,
  "battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles the tank has been involved in */,
  "average_wr" REAL /* Average win rate of the tank */,
  "player_wr_at_tier" REAL /* Average win rate of players at the tank's tier */,
  "players" INTEGER /* Total number of players who have used the tank */,
  "battles_per_player" REAL /* Average number of battles per player for the tank */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the tank */,
  "armor_thickness" INTEGER /* Armor thickness of the tank */,
  "firepower" INTEGER /* Firepower of the tank */,
  "mobility" REAL /* Mobility of the tank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tanks_vehicle_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the vehicle class (e.g., speed, agility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the player last logged in */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles the player has participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins the player has achieved */,
  "current_tier" INTEGER /* Current tier of the player */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_tier FOREIGN KEY ("current_tier") REFERENCES tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date the battle took place */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map where the battle occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the battle in minutes */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players in the battle */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins in the battle */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses in the battle */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the battle (e.g., team deathmatch, capture the flag) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the battle (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the battle took place (e.g., day, night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the map image */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the map */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Terrain type of the map (e.g., desert, forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_battles" (
  "player_battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's participation in a battle */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank used by the player */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills achieved by the player */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player */,
  "damage_received" INTEGER /* Total damage received by the player */,
  "experience_gained" INTEGER /* Experience points gained by the player */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Credits earned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_battles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_battles_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_battles_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tier */,
  "required_experience" INTEGER /* Required experience points to reach the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, data analyst, community manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
